name: WennSoft Field Service & Construction API
what_it_does: WennSoft REST API for field service management and construction project accounting platform built on Microsoft Dynamics GP and Business Central. Enables AI agents to manage service call creation, technician dispatch, and work order lifecycle for field service operations, handle construction project setup, phase tracking, and budget management for project-based businesses, access service agreement and preventive maintenance scheduling data for contract management, retrieve technician time entry and labor cost data for job cost accounting, manage parts inventory and procurement workflow for field service supply chain, handle customer equipment service history and warranty tracking, access certified payroll and prevailing wage data for public works compliance, retrieve project cost and billing data for construction accounting, manage subcontractor management and payment tracking, and integrate field service and construction data with Microsoft Dynamics GP, Business Central, and ERP platforms.
use_cases: Dispatching technicians from service management agents
Tracking construction project costs from job accounting agents
Managing service contracts from maintenance scheduling agents
Processing certified payroll from public works compliance agents
not_for: Organizations not on Microsoft Dynamics GP or Business Central
Enterprise field service without Dynamics ERP integration requirement
Commercial construction without job cost accounting and certified payroll
best_when: A mechanical, HVAC, electrical, or plumbing contractor or specialty construction firm using Microsoft Dynamics GP or Business Central wants AI agents to automate service dispatch, project cost tracking, service contract management, and certified payroll compliance.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: WennSoft certified payroll for public works jobs has Davis-Bacon prevailing wage requirements — automated payroll processing without prevailing wage rate validation creates federal and state labor law violations. Automated technician dispatch for licensed trades (HVAC, electrical) must validate license requirements for the specific work and jurisdiction. Construction billing automation for AIA contract billing requires schedule of values accuracy.

auth.notes: WennSoft uses API key and OAuth authentication tied to Microsoft Dynamics authentication. REST API for Business Central version; older GP integration via web services. Milwaukee, Wisconsin HQ. Private company (AMETEK subsidiary). WennSoft Service Management and WennSoft Project Accounting are the primary products. Built on and requires Microsoft Dynamics platform. Strong in mechanical, HVAC, and specialty contractor markets in North America. Competes with BuildOps and Fieldpoint for trade contractor FSM.

pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; requires Microsoft Dynamics GP or Business Central license
pricing.notes: Milwaukee, Wisconsin. AMETEK subsidiary. WennSoft Service Management and Project Accounting for Microsoft Dynamics. Strong in mechanical, HVAC, and specialty construction trades. Certified payroll and prevailing wage modules for public works. Dynamics GP (legacy) and Business Central (modern) support. Competes with BuildOps (commercial FSM) and Viewpoint (construction accounting) for contractor market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; Dynamics platform dependent

known_agent_gotchas: Microsoft Dynamics dependency — WennSoft is tightly coupled to Dynamics GP or Business Central; API access, authentication, and data model reflect Dynamics architecture and version
GP vs. Business Central API difference — WennSoft on Dynamics GP uses legacy web services; WennSoft on Business Central uses REST API; confirm platform version before integration
Certified payroll compliance — Davis-Bacon prevailing wage rates vary by county and project type; automated payroll without prevailing wage rate validation creates federal labor law violations
AMETEK subsidiary — WennSoft is a subsidiary of AMETEK Inc. (industrial manufacturer); product roadmap subject to parent company priorities; verify development investment level
Trade license dispatch — HVAC, electrical, and plumbing dispatch automation must validate technician license for specific work type and state jurisdiction
Niche market API maturity — WennSoft serves specialty contractors (not mass market); API documentation and developer tooling are less mature than enterprise competitors
agent_readiness.security_notes: Field service and construction. SOC2. API key/OAuth via Dynamics. US/CA. Job cost, payroll, and field service data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Field service and construction. SOC2. API key. US. Contractor job cost and payroll data.
